80698489.title: 2026 Ohio House of Representatives election
80698489.extract: The 2026 Ohio House of Representatives election will be held on November 3, 2026, alongside the other 2026 United States elections. Voters will elect members of the Ohio House of Representatives in all 99 of the U.S. state of Ohio's legislative districts to serve a two-year term.
